title: Mobile-First Redesign
changes: New bottom tab navigation on mobile (Home, Review, Learn, Stats) with due-count badge
Swipe left/right on flashcards to rate them (Again or Good)
3 answer buttons on mobile (Again/Good/Easy) for faster one-handed review
Sticky progress header and start button during review sessions
Skeleton loading screens replace 'Loading...' text across all list pages
OLED-safe dark mode colors prevent screen smearing
Haptic feedback on card flips, correct answers, and swipe gestures (native app)
Touch-optimized buttons with 44px minimum tap targets
Upload flow now shows a 3-step progress indicator
Larger Chinese character text (22px) in story reading mode
Pill-shaped tap-to-reveal buttons for pinyin and translations in stories
iOS and Android native app support via Capacitor
